arts.ttl: Juve face Genoa to get back on track
arts.sum: Genoa have conceded in each of their last five away matches in Serie A, after shipping only one goal in the previous five; moreover, the Rossoblù have yet to win in six away games played in 2025 in the competition (D3, L3), with their last away win coming on December 28 against Empoli. Juventus have not scored in their last two Serie A matches and have already registered three games in a row without scoring once this season, in September against Roma, Empoli, and Napoli; this could be only their third season with two streaks of at least three consecutive games without goals for the Bianconeri in the competition, after 1955/56 with Sandro Puppo and 1962/63 with Paulo Amaral.
